arts.ttl: Team News: Aston Villa vs. Nottingham Forest injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Aston Villa and Nottingham Forest.

Aston Villa have launched an official USA account on Instagram! The club will extend its global profile on the popular and ever-growing social media platform to engage with our loyal fans and reach new audiences in the US. Instagram is one of the most downloaded social media apps in the world, with billions of active monthly users. Villa’s dedicated new account, @AVFCUSA, will share insightful images, entertaining videos and creative content to bring you closer to the claret and blue action – both on and off the pitch. The club currently reach 20+million social media followers across its official Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and YouTube channels. And you can now follow us on our official USA Instagram account – look out for the blue tick! If you’re not already an Instagram user, simply download the app for iOS or Google Play. Aston Villa USA IG account Follow Us Here

arts.ttl: PSG’s Luis Enrique full of praise for Aston Villa – But doesn’t think Unai Emery has an advantage
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain coach Luis Enrique has insisted Unai Emery’s knowledge of him and his club won’t be the reason Aston Villa win their upcoming clash. Foot Mercato cover comments from the PSG boss today ahead of the big clash between PSG and Aston Villa in the Champions League this week. arts.ttl: BBC to show Crystal Palace-Aston Villa semi-final
arts.sum: The FA Cup semi-final between Crystal Palace and Aston Villa at Wembley on Saturday, 26 April will be shown live on BBC One.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa told details of Man City Premier League challenge as wait for PSR ruling goes on
arts.sum: Details of Manchester City's legal challenge to the Premier League's updated rules on commercial deals have been shared with the other 19 top-flight clubs, including Aston Villa and Wolves. City launched arbitration proceedings on January 20 against the validity of the league's amended associated party transaction (APT) rules, which seek to ensure deals struck between clubs and entities linked to their ownership are for fair market value.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery delivers Ollie Watkins truth amid Marcus Rashford decisions
arts.sum: Unai Emery doesn’t want to take any risks with Ollie Watkins, who is "feeling better" after struggling with a knee injury in recent weeks. Aston Villa striker Ollie Watkins suffered a knee problem before the March international break

arts.sum: Unai Emery has given a team news update ahead of Aston Villa's clash with Nottingham Forest Aston Villa have no fresh injury concerns ahead of their final training session before facing Nottingham Forest in the Premier League on Saturday.
